title: Checklist promoted to canonical authority
pass_rule: Registry parses and every checklist row has stable id requirement and evidence-required rule

title: PEER fail-closed regression
pass_rule: PEER without verified OS peer credential evidence is denied and PEER with verified evidence is accepted

title: Implementation-ahead classification ready
pass_rule: Every audit item has class owner spec target implementation target and gate

title: Execution_Plan execution-control artifacts ready
pass_rule: Execution_Plan can be delegated to agents without missing tracking or closure-model artifacts

title: Spec authority complete
pass_rule: No target row remains server_unspecified or undocumented_implementation

title: Auth registry complete
pass_rule: All driver-required and code-visible methods/providers are registered with support state verifier boundary and fail-closed behavior

title: Wire/session byte authority complete
pass_rule: All native-wire/session/connect/cancel/reset/reauth/notification/message schemas are byte specified

title: Parameter/result/type authority complete
pass_rule: Every D7/D8/D9/D13 metadata and type row has canonical byte/layout authority

title: Protocol version skew authority complete
pass_rule: Old/new client/server feature negotiation downgrade and unknown extension behavior are specified with test rows

title: Deterministic refusal authority complete
pass_rule: Unsupported guarded conditional and N/A behavior has exact SQLSTATE message vector retryability and finality status

title: Implementation reconciled
pass_rule: Every accepted spec feature is implemented and every unaccepted implementation-ahead feature is guarded or refused

title: Fuzz and fault injection gate complete
pass_rule: Malformed input replay downgrade and race cases fail closed without crash auth bypass or MGA finality drift

title: Driver and adapter manifests complete
pass_rule: Every lane status file has no required not_started implemented_without_evidence server_unspecified or undocumented_implementation rows

title: Packaging distribution evidence complete
pass_rule: Every claimed lane has reproducible package metadata install smoke signing or explicit non-signing citation and build output isolation

title: CTest driver gate passes
pass_rule: CTest rejects missing row evidence and passes all claimed driver/adaptor/tool routes

title: Server verification packets pass
pass_rule: Every claimed driver lane packet runs against live ScratchBird route and records evidence

title: Benchmark route correct
pass_rule: Benchmark uses client/tool to SBWP/TLS or admitted IPC to listener/parser/server/engine route and engine auth policy

title: Performance budget gate passes
pass_rule: Real-route latency throughput TLS overhead bulk transfer and allocation budgets are measured and enforced

title: Documentation and sample app gate passes
pass_rule: Driver adapter and tool docs include executable sample apps for DSN auth TLS diagnostics transactions metadata and lifecycle

title: Donor-driver compatibility route gate passes
pass_rule: Donor compatibility tests use donor tools or compatibility drivers through the admitted ScratchBird route

title: Inventory synchronized
pass_rule: Public registry and inventory reflect true implemented/proven state

title: Final closure
pass_rule: All gates pass and no target row is grey

title: Machine-readable release declaration generated
pass_rule: Release declaration states supported fail_closed conditional_n/a or not_implemented for every checklist row and lane
